Discover Afghanistan's Attractions

Ancient cities, dramatic landscapes, and cultural treasures await

Plan Your Visit
Attractions

Explore the Highlights

Afghanistan is home to some of the world's most remarkable and least-visited wonders.

Ancient Civilizations Bazaars & Artisans Landmarks Nature & Adventure Rural Spiritual & Religious Urban
Nature & Adventure

Badakhshan Mountains & Lakes

Alpine peaks and sapphire glacial lakes.

Badakhshan

Nature & Adventure

The Wakhan Corridor

The legendary 'Roof of the World'.

Badakhshan

Nature & Adventure

Mount Noshaq

Afghanistan's highest and mightiest peak.

Badakhshan

Rural

Badghis Hills & Nomadic Pastures

Rolling pistachio hills and nomadic life.

Badghis

Ancient Civilizations

Surkh Kotal

Majestic ruins of the Kushan Empire.

Baghlan

Spiritual & Religious

Shrine of Hazrat Ali (Blue Mosque)

A turquoise masterpiece of Islamic art.

Balkh

Ancient Civilizations

Ancient City of Balkh

The historic 'Mother of Cities'.

Balkh

Landmarks

Tomb of Rabia Balkhi

A shrine to Persian literature's first poet.

Balkh

Ancient Civilizations

Haji Piyada (Nine Domes) Mosque

Afghanistan's oldest surviving mosque.

Balkh

Spiritual & Religious

Rumi's Father's House (Madrasa)

The ancestral home of the great mystic Rumi.

Balkh

Landmarks

Qala-i-Jangi Fortress

Massive 19th-century earthwork fortress.

Balkh

Ancient Civilizations

Buddha Niches of Bamyan

Iconic Silk Road cultural giants.

Bamyan

Ancient Civilizations

Shahr-e-Gholghola

The haunting 'City of Screams' ruins.

Bamyan

Ancient Civilizations

Shahr-e-Zohak

The dramatic 'Red City' mountain fortress.

Bamyan

Nature & Adventure

Band-e-Amir National Park

Stunning sapphire-blue travertine lakes.

Bamyan

Nature & Adventure

Koh-e-Baba Mountain Range

The snowy spine of the Central Highlands.

Bamyan

Nature & Adventure

Dragon Valley

Nature's petrified 'Dragon' ridge.

Bamyan

Ancient Civilizations

Chehel Burj Bamyan Ruins

The mysterious 'Forty Towers' fortress.

Bamyan

Rural

Daykundi Highlands

Terraced valleys and almond blossoms.

Daykundi

Landmarks

Farah Citadel

An ancient river-side desert fortress.

Farah

Rural

Faryab Cultural Villages

Turkmen heritage and artisan weaving.

Faryab

Ancient Civilizations

Ghazni Minarets

Ornate 12th-century victory towers.

Ghazni

Landmarks

Bala Hisar of Ghazni

The historic high citadel of the south.

Ghazni

Spiritual & Religious

Tomb of Sultan Mahmud

Resting place of a medieval world-conqueror.

Ghazni

Ancient Civilizations

Tapa Sardar

Remains of a massive hilltop stupa.

Ghazni

Ancient Civilizations

Palace of Sultan Mas'ud III

Ruined grandeur of the Ghaznavid court.

Ghazni

Landmarks

Minaret of Jam

A 12th-century masterpiece in the wilderness.

Ghor

Rural

Rural Ghor Highlands

Wild mountains and isolated stone villages.

Ghor

Nature & Adventure

Helmand River Landscape

A lush desert lifeline and river oasis.

Helmand

Landmarks

Qala-e-Bost Arch

Iconic Ghaznavid arch and desert citadel.

Helmand

Bazaars & Artisans

Herat Old City & Bazaars

A vibrant maze of silk and copper.

Herat

Landmarks

Herat Citadel

Timeless fortress of Alexander the Great.

Herat

Spiritual & Religious

Herat Friday Mosque

A dazzling jewel of Timurid tilework.

Herat

Landmarks

Herat Minarets

Striking silhouettes of a lost empire.

Herat

Ancient Civilizations

Tala Tepe

Site of the famous 'Bactrian Gold'.

Jowzjan

Landmarks

Darulaman Palace

Iconic symbol of national resilience.

Kabul

Landmarks

Kabul National Museum

Treasury of Afghanistan's ancient past.

Kabul

Landmarks

Babur's Gardens

Terraced Mughal paradise in Kabul.

Kabul

Spiritual & Religious

Shah-e-Du Shamshira Mosque

The unique 'Mosque of Two Swords'.

Kabul

Spiritual & Religious

Sakhi Shrine

A vivid blue beacon of Kabul's faith.

Kabul

Urban

Wazir Akbar Khan Hill

The best panoramic viewpoint in Kabul.

Kabul

Bazaars & Artisans

Chicken Street

Kabul's legendary antiques market.

Kabul

Nature & Adventure

Qargha Lake

Kabul's favorite weekend lakeside escape.

Kabul

Urban

TV Tower Hill (Mount Asmai)

A high-altitude gaze over the city.

Kabul

Landmarks

Bala Hissar

Kabul's ancient hilltop 'High Fortress'.

Kabul

Urban

Kabul Zoo

A resilient center of family life.

Kabul

Landmarks

Taq-e-Zafar Paghman

European-style arch in a mountain retreat.

Kabul

Bazaars & Artisans

Murad Khane

Beautifully restored timber-framed old city.

Kabul

Landmarks

Tape Nader Khan

Royal mausoleums on a quiet hill.

Kabul

Bazaars & Artisans

Kahfroshi Bird Market

A sensory journey through the bird bazaar.

Kabul

Urban

Ghazi Olympic Stadium

The heart of Afghan sports and football.

Kabul

Landmarks

OMAR Landmine Museum

Educational insight into humanitarian work.

Kabul

Ancient Civilizations

Khurd-Kabul Pass

Dramatic mountain pass of military legend.

Kabul

Spiritual & Religious

Tomb of Ahmad Shah Durrani

Shrine of the 'Father of Afghanistan'.

Kandahar

Spiritual & Religious

Shrine of Mirwais Hotak

Mausoleum of the Hotaki dynasty's founder.

Kandahar

Spiritual & Religious

Baba Wali Shrine

Hillside shrine with Arghandab Valley views.

Kandahar

Spiritual & Religious

Mosque of the Sacred Cloak

The most revered spiritual site in Kandahar.

Kandahar

Ancient Civilizations

Chilzina and the Forty Steps

Ancient rock-cut stairs and royal views.

Kandahar

Urban

Ayno Mina

A model of modern Afghan urbanism.

Kandahar

Rural

Nijrab Valley

Lush terraced hills and river springs.

Kapisa

Urban

Khost City Scenery

Pashtun heartland and rolling hills.

Khost

Kunar River Valley

Dramatic forests and rushing whitewater.

Kunduz City & Farmlands

The fertile breadbasket of the north.

Alingar Valley

A lush, river-fed agricultural oasis.

Rural

Logar Valleys

Fertile wheat fields and apple orchards.

Logar

Urban

Jalalabad City

The garden city of the east.

Darunta Lake

Scenic reservoir with a mountain backdrop.

Nangarhar

Hadda Archaeological Site

Lost monasteries of the Buddhist era.

Nangarhar

Gandamak Last Stand Site

A hilltop steeped in 'Great Game' history.

Landmarks

Nimroz Citadel

A monumental mud-brick desert ruin.

Landmarks

Qala Muhammad

Traditional dwellings of the southwest.

Nimroz

Urban

Kamal Khan Dam

A modern engineering marvel on the Helmand.

Nimroz

Rural

Parun Valley

The capital of 'The Land of Light'.

Bashgal Valley

Traditional wooden homes and mountain paths.

Barg-e Matal & Lakes

Gardez & Zurmat Highlands

Ahmad Shah Massoud Mausoleum

Paryan Valley

Panjshir

Salang Pass

The high-altitude gateway to the north.

Parwan

Landmarks

Jabal Saraj Palace

Royal-era fortress at the foot of the pass.

Parwan

Takht-e Rostam

Unique rock-cut Buddhist stupa.

Sar-e-Pol Meadows

Ai-Khanoum

Tarin Kot Surroundings

Wardak Highlands

High valleys and historic stone settlements.

Shahjoy & Qalat Valleys

Discover the breathtaking landscapes, ancient history, and rich culture of Afghanistan with our expert-guided tours.
